items.title: Query and update DOM: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? innerHTML and textContent are interchangeable for displaying user text.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Use textContent for text; innerHTML parses markup and is unsafe for untrusted strings without robust sanitization.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Use textContent for text; innerHTML parses markup and is unsafe for untrusted strings without robust sanitization.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.

options.text: Use textContent for text; innerHTML parses markup and is unsafe for untrusted strings without robust sanitization.
innerHTML and textContent are interchangeable for displaying user text.

answer.explanation: Use textContent for text; innerHTML parses markup and is unsafe for untrusted strings without robust sanitization.

items.title: Query and update DOM: verified implementation facet
items.prompt: Select elements and update text, attributes, classes and properties with correct distinctions. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating query, text, data attribute and class updates; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted authoring draft. Runtime evidence does not replace independent human standards, pedagogy, accessibility, answer-oracle, and formal-exam review.

hints: Implement the smallest artifact that satisfies the declared observable contract, then check the visible case before considering the hidden boundary.

feedback.correct: The locked authoring verifier observed the declared bounded facet in both visible and hidden cases.
feedback.incorrect: At least one deterministic authoring check failed; inspect the exact artifact, interaction state, viewport, and observable result without assuming hidden-case details.

criteria.description: Passes the visible and hidden deterministic checks for the declared implementation facet in its pinned authoring environment.

privateAuthorNotes: This code item and its oracle are AI-assisted draft material with reviewer=null and examEligibility=false.
Browser-verifier items are authoring evidence only and must never be routed to the official untrusted-code runner or formal exam pipeline.
items.starterCode: // TODO: implement the declared bounded browser behavior.

answer.referenceSolution: const list = document.querySelector("ul"); const item = document.createElement("li"); item.textContent = "Arrays"; item.dataset.skill = "arrays"; list.append(item); document.querySelector("h1").classList.add("ready");
answer.explanation: The reference is a bounded javascript artifact for query, text, data attribute and class updates. Passing proves only the declared observable facet, not holistic mastery or human accessibility approval.
